## Summary
- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Scope
- [ ] `client`
- [ ] `admin`
- [ ] `server`
- [ ] `mobile`
- [ ] docs/config only
 
## Validation
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint` in affected package(s)
- [ ] Ran `npm run build` in affected package(s)
- [ ] Manual testing completed for changed flows

### Commands Run
```bash
# Example:
# cd client && npm run lint && npm run build
```

## UI Evidence (client/admin)
- Add screenshots or short video recordings for UI changes.

## API Changes (server)
- Endpoints added/updated:
- Request/response contract changes:
- Backward compatibility impact:

## Database & Environment
- [ ] Prisma schema/migration updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Env var changes documented
- [ ] Seed or data migration notes included

## Checklist
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No unrelated files changed
- [ ] Documentation updated where required
